rationale: Both candidates independently traced the same seed→tts_local_seed→sampling-path mechanism correctly and landed on the same non-blocking nit (add a comment explaining the intentional omission), which is reasonably grounded given ground truth is just an LGTM/approve with no inline concerns. Y edges ahead by additionally noting stage 1's seed removal was functionally inert (temperature=0.0 greedy decode reads only stage 0), a correct and non-obvious technical distinction X missed, and by explicitly recommending APPROVE, matching the ground-truth verdict more closely than X's more conservative COMMENT. Both are well-grounded in the diff and equally actionable with file/line pointers.
